appliedUpdates.description: Documented in .factory/library/environment.md that Convex Auth password flows require JWT_PRIVATE_KEY and JWKS on the Convex deployment.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that routing-only or frontend-heavy features may skip backend-first Convex test creation when no Convex functions change, while still requiring frontend tests and browser verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The app-shell-routing worker explicitly deviated from step 3 of .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md because the feature required router/auth-shell work rather than new Convex functions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note that module workers should avoid exporting extra named constants beyond the default worker and Durable Object classes because wrangler dev can fail to boot.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The worker-stub handoff recorded a skill suggestion after wrangler startup issues caused by extra exports; the final worker entry point keeps only the default export, BrowserLeaseDO, and internal helpers.
